title: carex repens
intro: Carex repens, commonly known as creeping grass or running grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the sedge family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Carex repens include soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Carex repens is typically prepared as a decoction or tincture, and can also be used as a topical cream or poultice to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
